energy_balance.rule: Broad outlet-strip bulk enthalpy sanity check using q_w, estimated heated area, inlet flow area, volumetric heat capacity, and velocity-magnitude-weighted outlet temperature.

enthalpy_balance.rule: Broad outlet-strip bulk enthalpy sanity check using q_w, estimated heated area, inlet flow area, volumetric heat capacity, and velocity-magnitude-weighted outlet temperature.

rule: Strict verification fails unless every retained fixed-grid case passes these physics checks.
